summary_text: はい、完了しています。 `~/.codex/skills` と `~/.claude/skills` の `x-auto-post-guard` / `x-auto-thumbnail-art-director` は repo SSOT に同期済みです。事前バックアップは [kernel-x-auto-skill-sync-20260402-112901](/Users/masayuki/.share-backups/kernel-x-auto-skill-sync-20260402-112901) にあります。 確認結果: - `bash [tests/test-sync-fugue-local-skills.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-sync-fugue-local-skills.sh)` pass - `bash [tests/test-x-auto-skill-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-x-auto-skill-contract.sh)` pass - `bash [scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh) --skill x-auto` pass - `bash [scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh) --skill x-auto-post-guard` pass - `bash [scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh) --skill x-auto-thumbnail-art-director` pass - local runtime files are byte-equal to repo `SKILL.md` on both Codex and Claude sides 必要なら次に、バックアップ削除用のコマンドだけ出します。
